overview.description: The PIMCO Active Bond Exchange-Traded Fund (BOND) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed portfolio that aims to maintain a consistent level of dividend income by investing in a broad array of fixed income sectors and utilizing income efficient implementation strategies. BOND was launched on Mar 1, 2012 and is issued by PIMCO.
